title: Testing thank you!
excerpt: Testing to determine if I can mark a topic as solved

posts.author: oliviadu (Olivia)
posts.cookedHtml: Testing to determine if I can mark a topic as solved

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve noticed the “Solved” button has vanished. @BiancaT was removing the “solved” button a community wide decision, to restrict it to certain people? I know people with certain “trust” had it just earlier this week, and monday Team Members did as well.

It seems its even gone from the ability for the original poster to select a solution to their question.
